---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What is the user-facing problem you're trying to solve? (Skip if this is purely an internal improvement.)

## Proposal

What you'd like iPLAID to do. Be as concrete as you can — a sketch of the UI or a code snippet of the API call beats prose.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought through, and why they don't work as well.

## Scope

- [ ] Pipeline / engine (`src/iplaid/`)
- [ ] Dispenser strategy (`src/iplaid/dispensers/`)
- [ ] Layout designer (`src/plaid_core/`)
- [ ] Backend API (`backend/`)
- [ ] Frontend (`frontend/`)
- [ ] Notebook (`notebooks/`)
- [ ] Docs / templates / config
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Additional context

Links to related issues, papers, similar features in other tools, etc.
